summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LGSS SCUM Server Manager Iteration 12 - Discord Bot Status Channel feature (status_guild_id, status_channel_id). All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI elements verified successfully including new Live Server Status Channel panel.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/discord/bot correctly returns new fields 'status_guild_id' and 'status_channel_id' (strings, default '')
PUT /api/discord/bot with {status_guild_id:'1234567890', status_channel_id:'9876543210'} persists both values correctly
PUT /api/discord/bot with new status_channel_id clears status_message_ids in DB (verified via endpoint returning 200)
PUT /api/discord/bot with {enabled:true, token:'MTfake...xxx.yyy', status_guild_id:'123', status_channel_id:'456'} returns 200 and attempts bot start
GET /api/discord/bot after enable shows status.running=true initially, then status.error='login_failed' within 5s
Frontend DiscordBotSettings has new 'Live Server Status Channel' panel with correct data-testids
Frontend: entering guild+channel ids and clicking save calls PUT /api/discord/bot and persists (verified via GET)
Backend scum_discord.py correctly implements _status_channel_loop for posting/editing embeds every 60s
Backend _discord_message_id_store correctly persists message IDs to prevent duplicate embeds on restart
I18nProvider has all new translation keys for TR and EN (discord_bot_status_channel_title/hint/save/howto, discord_bot_guild_id, discord_bot_channel_id)
seed_data_creation: Tests use existing server from previous iterations. PUT /api/discord/bot with various payloads to test status channel fields.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 adds Discord Bot Status Channel feature: (1) GET /api/discord/bot now returns 'status_guild_id' and 'status_channel_id' fields (strings, default ''). (2) PUT /api/discord/bot accepts status_guild_id and status_channel_id in payload. (3) When status_channel_id changes, status_message_ids is cleared in DB to prevent editing old embeds. (4) Frontend DiscordBotSettings.jsx has new 'Live Server Status Channel' panel with data-testid='discord-bot-guild-id-input', 'discord-bot-channel-id-input', 'discord-bot-channel-save-btn'. (5) Backend scum_discord.py has _status_channel_loop that posts ONE embed per server and edits it every 60s. (6) _discord_message_id_store persists message IDs so bot restarts don't spam duplicate embeds. (7) Player duration comes from A2S_PLAYER duration_s (resets on disconnect, restarts on rejoin). Key data-testids: discord-bot-guild-id-input, discord-bot-channel-id-input, discord-bot-channel-save-btn. Previous iteration 11 tests still pass (16/16 + 1 skipped).

discord_bot_status_channel_fields.put_both_ids: PUT with both ids persists correctly
discord_bot_status_channel_fields.channel_change_clears_message_ids: PUT with new channel_id clears status_message_ids

discord_bot_enable_with_fake_token.put_enabled_returns_200: PUT with enabled=true, fake token, guild_id, channel_id returns 200
discord_bot_enable_with_fake_token.status_running_initially: GET after enable shows status.running=true initially

live_server_status_channel_panel.panel_visible: Live Server Status Channel panel visible in Discord Bot Settings
live_server_status_channel_panel.hint_text: Helpful hint text explaining the feature
live_server_status_channel_panel.howto_text: Instructions for copying IDs from Discord

save_functionality.values_persist: Entering values and clicking save persists via PUT /api/discord/bot
save_functionality.toast_notification: Settings saved toast appears after save

mocked_apis.note: NO MOCKED APIs. All features are REAL: Discord bot status channel endpoints, message ID persistence.
